summary: First testing iteration for In Limbo MVP (Fase 1a+1b+1c). Backend: 25 pytest tests across auth, organisations, listings, cloudinary, admin — 24 passed, 1 skipped (admin-approve-tom was re-run after Tom already approved). Frontend: end-to-end Playwright verification of landing, catalogus (visitor + pending + validated), limited/full listing detail, admin queue, multi-step register, wizard load, mobile catalogus, pending-user routing. All critical flows working. No blocking bugs found.

minor.issue: Email is silently lowercased on save. Acceptable behavior but undocumented — frontend should display lowercased email after update or warn user.
Pydantic schema rejects mixed-case enum (e.g. 'hout'); only 'Hout' accepted. Frontend wizard must use the exact title-case literal — verify ListingWizard sends correct casing.

issues: GET /api/auth/me logs a 401 in browser console on every initial render — expected by design but noisy. Consider catching the 401 silently in AuthContext to keep console clean.

action_items: Cloudinary API_SECRET in /app/backend/.env is identical to API_KEY (971768844624139). The /api/cloudinary/signature endpoint returns 200 (contract OK), but real Cloudinary uploads from the wizard will fail with 'invalid signature'. Ask user for the real API secret before listing-creation E2E can be exercised in browser.
Optional: suppress 401 console noise from initial /auth/me probe.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py uses HS256 + secret from env, httpOnly + samesite=none + secure cookie — good. bcrypt.gensalt() used — good. Cookie deletion repeats samesite/secure — good cross-site handling.
server.py: strip_mongo() consistently used; passwordHash never leaked. _id excluded.
server.py listings _public_listing_view correctly strips description/weight for visitors and pending users — verified via tests.

Lazy archive trigger on every GET /listings call (archive_expired_listings) is a hidden write inside a read endpoint; under high read traffic this may double-write. Consider moving to background scheduler only.
CORS middleware is added AFTER router include — works in FastAPI but conventionally added first. allow_origins=['*'] in .env is not used (frontend_url is explicitly listed) — OK.
/api/organisations does not paginate — fixed limit(50). For now seed is small; flag for future.
/api/users/me does not validate uniqueness of phone but uniqueness is not required by spec — OK.
Admin reject flow correctly marks lone-owner org as rejected; multi-member org safely left active.
test_credentials: All seeded credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md work as documented. Tom was approved during testing then manually reset to pending in MongoDB to keep admin queue intact.
seed_data_creation: Test-created users (TEST_ prefix) remain in DB as pending users — they appear in the admin queue. Main agent may want to filter test_ data out of admin UI screenshots or add a one-shot cleanup script.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin queue currently has 7 pending users (2 seeded: Tom + Nora; 5 TEST_-prefixed leftovers from registration tests). Cloudinary upload from the browser will fail (api_secret == api_key in .env). All other backend + frontend flows are green. Re-seed by running the backend pod (startup() seeds idempotently).
